meta.sprintName: Sprint 40 - Analytics Coverage Expansion (GA4 + Sentry aligned)
meta.goal: Extend existing GA4 basics (Sprint 1) and Sentry instrumentation (Sprint 24) to track all major user journeys shipped/planned across Sprint 1–39: acquisition → onboarding/auth → studio/editor → storybook creation → exports (PDF/DOCX/PPT) → billing → emails → reliability/perf. Deliver usable funnels, drop-off reasons, and operational correlation via session_id.
nonGoals: Not building a CRM inside GA4
No re-architecture of Sentry; reuse Sprint 24 patterns
principles: Event naming is canonical and typed (no ad-hoc event strings)
Every critical step has: start, success, fail/cancel signals
Every error/failure event has a matching Sentry breadcrumb/tag with session_id
Consent-respecting analytics (do not fire before consent where required)

existingWork.ga4: Basic GA4 integration exists from Sprint 1 (page_view + some events).
existingWork.sentry: Sentry error logging & traces exist from Sprint 24 with release/version tagging.

exports: DOCX and PPT export were planned in later sprints (38/39)

deliverables: Canonical GA4 event taxonomy covering Sprint 1–39 features
Funnel exploration templates for key journeys
Sentry ↔ GA4 correlation via session_id and breadcrumb mirroring
Dashboards/reports aligned to GA4 Business objectives: Generate leads / Drive sales / Marketing funnels

epics.title: Audit & Coverage Map for Sprint 1–39 Features
epics.description: Create a tracking coverage matrix from all shipped/planned features across sprints and map them to GA4 events, funnels, and error reasons.

tasks.title: Inventory feature areas (Sprint 1–39) into a Coverage Matrix
details: Feature areas to include: Landing/SEO, Auth (email/google), Onboarding, Studio entry, Storybook creation, Guided templates, Canva-lite editor, Layout→PDF renderer, Export (PDF), Export (DOCX/PPT), Payments/Billing gating, Emails (magic link/OTP/app notifications), 2FA, Error logging/observability, Performance (editor/render), Sharing/Invite relatives, Table of contents/reflow/orientation, Asset uploads/storage.
acceptanceCriteria: Every feature area has at least one measurable goal metric (conversion or engagement).
Every goal metric lists required GA4 events + parameters + funnel step mapping.

tasks.title: Define top funnels + activation definitions
details: Define canonical funnels: Acquisition (landing→signup), Activation (signup/login→first storybook created), Completion (storybook→export), Monetization (pricing→checkout→purchase), Reliability (export fails, api fails, editor crash).
Define 'Activation' single source of truth event (e.g., storybook_first_completed OR storybook_create + step_complete threshold).
acceptanceCriteria: At least 4 funnels are explicitly defined with step events and success criteria.
Activation event definition is unambiguous and implementable.

epics.title: Canonical GA4 Taxonomy + Typed Instrumentation Layer
epics.description: Build a strict analytics layer to ensure consistent event naming/params and easy adoption across the codebase.

stories.title: Create canonical event spec aligned to objectives and funnels

tasks.title: Create GA4 event taxonomy (v1) for Sprint 1–39 coverage
details: Use recommended GA4 names where applicable: sign_up, login, generate_lead, begin_checkout, purchase.
Define custom events for editor/storybook/export lifecycle.
Define required common params and per-event params.
Explicitly forbid PII fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Spec lists: event_name, when_fired, required_params, optional_params, sample_payload, owner.
Spec includes PII guardrails and examples of allowed IDs (lead_id, user_id as non-PII).

tasks.title: Implement typed analytics wrapper (client + server safe)
details: analytics.track(eventName, params) with runtime validation in dev.
analyticsContext() attaches: app_env, release, route, page_type, session_id, user_id (non-PII), workspace_id/project_id (if applicable).
Support SSR-safe no-op and client-only sending.
Support feature flags to disable noisy events.
acceptanceCriteria: No direct gtag() calls remain outside analytics wrapper (except bootstrapping).
In GA4 DebugView, events include release + session_id + page_type.
Wrapper enforces required params at compile time (TypeScript).

tasks.title: Add lint rule / CI check to prevent untyped analytics calls
details: ESLint rule or grep-based CI check disallowing 'gtag(' and 'window.dataLayer.push(' outside analytics module.
acceptanceCriteria: PR fails if direct analytics calls are introduced outside approved modules.

epics.title: Marketing Funnels + Generate Leads Tracking
epics.description: Instrument acquisition/onboarding flows and build GA4 funnels to measure drop-offs.

tasks.title: Instrument landing CTAs and intent signals
details: Track CTA clicks: cta_click with cta_id, placement, page_type, variant_id.
Track pricing page interactions: pricing_view, pricing_plan_select.
acceptanceCriteria: CTA performance can be broken down by landing page + variant_id.
Pricing plan selection rate is measurable by traffic source.

tasks.title: Instrument signup lifecycle
details: Events: sign_up_start, sign_up (method=email/google), sign_up_fail (reason).
Track auth provider selection and cancellations.
acceptanceCriteria: Funnel step 'sign_up_start → sign_up' is measurable with drop-off reasons.
sign_up includes method param consistently.

tasks.title: Instrument login lifecycle
details: Events: login_start, login (method), login_fail (reason).
If you have 'set password' flow: set_password_view, set_password_success, set_password_fail.
acceptanceCriteria: Login conversion measurable by method and device.
Password setup funnel measurable independently.

tasks.title: Instrument studio entry (activation gateway)
details: Events: studio_view, studio_enter, onboarding_step_complete (if applicable).
acceptanceCriteria: You can measure signup→studio_enter conversion rate.
You can break down by traffic source and method.

tasks.title: Instrument lead forms
details: Event: generate_lead on successful submission with lead_type, form_id, cta_id, page_type.
Add lead_form_view, lead_form_start, lead_form_error (optional).
acceptanceCriteria: Lead conversion rate by Landing page and Source/Medium is visible.
No PII is sent to GA4; lead_id is allowed if non-PII.

tasks.title: Define GA4 audiences for retargeting (optional)
details: Audiences: visited pricing but no signup, signup but no studio_enter, storybook_create but no export_complete, export_start but no export_complete.
acceptanceCriteria: Audiences defined in GA4 (documented steps) and measurable sizes.

epics.title: Studio / Storybook / Editor Tracking (Sprint 6–10 style features)
epics.description: Track core product usage, guided template interactions, and editor engagement so you know what drives completion.

tasks.title: Instrument storybook CRUD
details: Events: storybook_create, storybook_open, storybook_save, storybook_delete.
Params: storybook_id (hashed/short), template_id, entry_point (studio/cta).
acceptanceCriteria: You can compute activation as storybook_create per user cohort.
Template performance measurable.

tasks.title: Instrument guided steps / TOC interactions
details: Events: storybook_step_view, storybook_step_complete(step_id), toc_open, toc_navigate(section_id).
Track orientation/reflow usage: reader_mode_change (orientation, reflow_enabled).
acceptanceCriteria: Drop-off can be attributed to specific step_id.
TOC usage correlates with completion measurable.

tasks.title: Instrument editor session + key interactions
details: Events: editor_open, editor_close, editor_action(action_type), editor_undo, editor_redo.
action_type examples: add_text, edit_text, add_image, crop_image, move_element, resize_element, change_template.
acceptanceCriteria: Editor engagement metrics available: avg actions/session, actions breakdown.
Editor usage can be segmented by template_id and device.

tasks.title: Instrument uploads/assets pipeline
details: Events: asset_upload_start, asset_upload_success, asset_upload_fail(reason), asset_delete.
Params: asset_type, size_bucket, provider (r2/s3).
acceptanceCriteria: Upload success rate and failure reasons measurable.

epics.title: Export Tracking (PDF + planned DOCX/PPT) + Reliability Signals
epics.description: Measure export conversion and diagnose failures/timeouts, aligned with renderer work.

tasks.title: Instrument PDF export lifecycle
details: Events: export_start(export_type=pdf), export_progress(stage, pct_bucket), export_complete, export_failed(reason, stage).
Params: storybook_pages_bucket, image_count_bucket, render_mode (client/server).
acceptanceCriteria: You can measure storybook_open → export_start → export_complete.
Failure reasons split by stage (layout, render, upload, download).

tasks.title: Align export failures with Sentry breadcrumbs + tags
details: On export_failed, create a Sentry breadcrumb with same payload and tag session_id, export_type, stage.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a Sentry issue, you can identify impacted export stage and correlate to GA4 via session_id.

tasks.title: Add export lifecycle events for DOCX and PPT (behind feature flags)
details: Reuse same event names with export_type=docx|ppt.
Track mapping option: content_model vs page_to_slide (ppt).
acceptanceCriteria: When flags enabled, events fire with export_type correctly.
No events fire when feature disabled.

epics.title: Billing / Paywall / Purchase Journey (if present in Sprint 27–39)
epics.description: Track when users hit paywalls, start checkout, and purchase; connect monetization drop-offs to UX issues.

tasks.title: Instrument paywall view and upgrade clicks
details: Events: paywall_view(reason, feature), upgrade_click(plan_id), billing_portal_open.
Params: gating_feature (export/pdf/docx/ppt), quota_remaining_bucket.
acceptanceCriteria: You can see which paywalls convert and which cause churn.
You can break down by feature gate type.

tasks.title: Instrument checkout lifecycle with GA4 recommended ecommerce events
details: Events: begin_checkout, add_payment_info, purchase.
Include item list for plans as items[] payload.
acceptanceCriteria: Drive sales reports in GA4 populate when provider is enabled.

tasks.title: Instrument payment failures + correlate with Sentry
details: Event: payment_failed(reason, provider, step). Add matching Sentry breadcrumb.
acceptanceCriteria: Payment failures are measurable and debuggable via Sentry.

epics.title: Email + Auth Operations Tracking (Magic link/OTP, templates, delivery)
epics.description: Track email auth success/failure and template flows without storing PII in GA4; use Sentry for technical diagnostics.

tasks.title: Instrument auth email events
details: Events: auth_email_send_start, auth_email_send_success, auth_email_send_fail(reason, provider).
Events: magic_link_open, magic_link_verify_success, magic_link_verify_fail(reason).
acceptanceCriteria: You can measure email auth conversion rates and failure reasons without PII.

epics.title: Drop-off Diagnostics: GA4 Failure Events + Sentry Correlation
epics.description: Make 'was it our issue?' answerable by logging friction signals and correlating sessions.

tasks.title: Define error_code taxonomy for analytics
details: Group codes: AUTH_*, EXPORT_*, UPLOAD_*, API_*, EDITOR_*, BILLING_*.
Map to user-facing messages and Sentry fingerprints.
acceptanceCriteria: Every 'fail' event uses error_code from taxonomy.
Sentry fingerprints map 1:many to error_code where appropriate.

tasks.title: Emit api_error/form_error/export_failed consistently
details: Hook fetch/Axios interceptor to emit api_error with endpoint_key, status_code, error_code.
Hook form validation to emit form_error with form_id, field_key, error_type.
acceptanceCriteria: Top API failures are measurable with endpoint_key breakdown.
Form drop-off is attributable to field-level friction.

tasks.title: Sentry correlation: session_id, user_id tags + breadcrumb mirroring
details: Ensure session_id exists early in app lifecycle and is added to Sentry scope.
Mirror critical GA4 failure events as Sentry breadcrumbs (category=analytics).
acceptanceCriteria: Any export_failed/api_error event yields a breadcrumb in Sentry with same session_id.

stories.title: Performance signals for editor + export renderer

tasks.title: Capture key timing metrics (no PII) for editor and export
details: Events: perf_editor_boot(ms_bucket), perf_export_total(ms_bucket), perf_export_stage(stage, ms_bucket).
Sentry: ensure performance traces include transaction names for editor and export routes.
acceptanceCriteria: You can compare export completion rate vs export_total latency buckets.
Sentry Performance shows transactions for editor/export paths.

epics.title: GA4 Explorations + Business Objectives Reporting Pack
epics.description: Make the data actionable in GA4 with saved explorations and documented report paths.

stories.title: Saved funnel explorations and breakdown templates

tasks.title: Create and document core funnels in GA4 Explore
details: Funnels: Acquisition, Activation, Completion (Export), Monetization (if enabled).
Breakdowns: device_category, browser, method, traffic_source, page_type, template_id.
Segments: sessions with api_error vs without; sessions with export_failed vs without.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 saved exploration definitions exist and are reproducible via documented steps.
Each funnel has 2+ useful breakdowns that highlight drop-offs.

tasks.title: Business objectives alignment checklist (Generate leads / Drive sales / Marketing funnels)
details: Document which events power each objective report and where to find them in GA4 UI.
Ensure key events are set and appear in standard reports.
acceptanceCriteria: A new team member can navigate to the right report for each objective and interpret the KPIs.

epics.title: QA, DebugView, and Privacy Guardrails
epics.description: Ensure tracking is correct, consented, and safe.

tasks.title: Create analytics QA checklist and test runs
details: Happy path: landing→signup→login→storybook_create→export_complete.
Failure paths: login_fail, api_error, export_failed, upload_fail.
Verify in GA4 DebugView and Sentry breadcrumbs.
acceptanceCriteria: QA checklist covers all critical steps and failure events.
At least 1 recorded test session proves GA4 + Sentry correlation via session_id.

tasks.title: Privacy review: ensure no PII leakage into GA4
details: Scan analytics payloads; blocklist fields like email, name, address, free-text story content.
Add runtime sanitizer that drops suspicious keys in development (warn) and production (drop).
acceptanceCriteria: Automated test or runtime guard prevents PII keys from being sent.
Docs clearly list forbidden payload fields.

definitionOfDone: All P0 tasks completed and verified in GA4 DebugView + Sentry
At least 3 saved funnel explorations documented
session_id correlation works: GA4 failure event ↔ Sentry breadcrumb/tag
No PII in analytics payloads (guardrail implemented and validated)
